_note: One Listening per A1 module. Scripts + questions anchored to each module's aligned vocabulary/grammar/expressions (Ola 1, distilled from the real lessons). Student-facing content in English. 5 questions per module (final M8 has 6): mix of multiple_choice/true_false/fill_in (auto-graded) + 1 open (Claude). MC correct-answer positions are varied so 'A' is not always right.

listenings.title: Meeting Someone New
listenings.transcript: Hi! My name is Carla. Nice to meet you. I am from Mexico, so I am Mexican. I am twenty-five years old, and I am a teacher. This is my friend David. He is from the United States. He is American, and he is a doctor. We are very happy to be here!

questions.questionText: Where is Carla from?
What is Carla's job?
David is American.
questions.explanation: Carla says David is from the United States and he is American.

questions.questionText: David is a ___. (one word)
Introduce yourself like Carla: say your name, where you are from, and your job.
questions.sampleAnswer: My name is Ana. I am from Colombia. I am a designer.

listenings.title: My Family
listenings.transcript: Hello! Let me tell you about my family. I have got one brother and two sisters. My father is a teacher and my mother is a doctor. My brother is twenty years old; he is a student. We all live together in a big house. I love my family very much.

questions.questionText: How many brothers has the speaker got?
questions.explanation: 'I have got one brother and two sisters.'

questions.questionText: What is the mother's job?
The father is a ___. (one word)
The brother is a student.
Describe your family: how many brothers or sisters have you got, and what is one person's job?
questions.sampleAnswer: I have got two sisters. My father is an engineer.

listenings.title: My Daily Routine
listenings.transcript: This is my daily routine. I always wake up at seven o'clock in the morning. Then I have breakfast and go to work. I usually have lunch at one o'clock. In the evening, I watch TV with my family. I never go to bed late. On weekends, I sometimes visit my friends.

questions.questionText: What time does the speaker wake up?
questions.explanation: 'I always wake up at seven o'clock.'

questions.questionText: The speaker has ___ at one o'clock. (one word)
questions.explanation: 'I usually have lunch at one o'clock.'

questions.questionText: How often does the speaker go to bed late?
In the evening, the speaker watches TV.
questions.explanation: 'In the evening, I watch TV with my family.'

questions.questionText: Describe your morning routine: what do you do, and at what time?
questions.sampleAnswer: I wake up at six o'clock. Then I have breakfast and go to work.

listenings.title: At the Restaurant
listenings.transcript: Waiter: Good evening! Here is the menu. What would you like to order? Customer: I would like the chicken with a salad, please. Waiter: And to drink? Customer: Can I have a glass of water and a coffee, please? Waiter: Of course. Customer: Thank you. The bill, please.

questions.questionText: What food does the customer order?
questions.explanation: 'I would like the chicken with a salad.'

questions.questionText: What does the customer want to drink?
questions.explanation: 'Can I have a glass of water and a coffee?'

questions.questionText: At the end, the customer asks for the ___. (one word)
The waiter gives the customer the menu.
Order a meal at a restaurant: say what food and drink you would like.
questions.sampleAnswer: I would like the chicken, please. Can I have a coffee?

listenings.title: Directions to the Bank
listenings.transcript: Tourist: Excuse me, where is the bank? Local: Go straight and turn left. The bank is next to the supermarket. Tourist: Is it near the park? Local: Yes, it is in front of the park. You can take the bus or go on foot. Tourist: Thank you very much!

questions.questionText: What is the tourist looking for?
The bank is next to the ___.
questions.explanation: 'The bank is next to the supermarket.'

questions.questionText: The bank is in front of the park.
questions.explanation: 'It is in front of the park.'

questions.questionText: The local says: 'Go straight and turn ___.' (one word)
Give directions to a place near your home. Use 'go straight', 'turn left/right', and 'next to'.
questions.sampleAnswer: Go straight and turn right. It is next to the park.

listenings.title: Buying a Jacket
listenings.transcript: Customer: How much is this blue jacket? Assistant: It is fifty dollars. Customer: And that red one? Assistant: The red one is forty dollars. It is cheaper than the blue one. Customer: Can I try it on? ... I'll take this red jacket. Do you have a bigger size? Assistant: Yes, here you are.

questions.questionText: How much is the blue jacket?
The red jacket is cheaper than the blue jacket.
questions.explanation: 'The red one is forty dollars. It is cheaper than the blue one.'

questions.questionText: Which jacket does the customer buy?
The customer asks for a ___ size. (one word)
Compare two things you can buy, and say which one you prefer. Use 'cheaper' or 'more expensive'.
questions.sampleAnswer: The red shirt is cheaper than the blue one. I'll take the red shirt.

listenings.title: Plans for the Weekend
listenings.transcript: Ana: What are you going to do next weekend? Sam: I am going to have a party at my house on Saturday. Would you like to come with me? Ana: Yes, I'd love to! What time? Sam: Let's meet at seven o'clock in the evening. Ana: Great. On Sunday I am going to go to the beach because it is summer. Sam: Sounds fun!

questions.questionText: What is Sam going to do on Saturday?
questions.explanation: 'I am going to have a party at my house on Saturday.'

questions.questionText: What time are they going to meet?
Ana is going to go to the beach on Sunday.
questions.explanation: 'On Sunday I am going to go to the beach.'

questions.questionText: Sam invites Ana: 'Would you like to come ___ me?' (one word)
questions.explanation: 'Would you like to come with me?'

questions.questionText: Make a plan for next weekend. Use 'I am going to ...'.
questions.sampleAnswer: Next weekend I am going to visit my family. On Sunday I am going to watch a movie.

listenings.title: My English Journey
listenings.transcript: Hi! My name is Lucia and I am from Colombia. I am twenty-eight years old and I am a designer. I have got a big family: two brothers and one sister. Every day I wake up at six o'clock and have breakfast. I love eating fruit and drinking coffee. My favourite place is the park near my house. Next month I am going to travel to Canada. I am very happy with my English!

questions.questionText: Where is Lucia from?
What is Lucia's job?
Lucia wakes up at ___ o'clock. (one word)
Lucia is going to travel to Canada next month.
questions.explanation: 'Next month I am going to travel to Canada.'

questions.questionText: How many brothers has Lucia got?
Tell your story: your name, where you are from, your job, and one plan for the future.
questions.sampleAnswer: My name is Pedro. I am from Mexico. I am a teacher. Next year I am going to study in the United States.
